snippet: Employees who are elected as chair or president of a committee of management of a community organisation may be granted leave of absence with pay for periods of up to 3 hours per week to fulfil their official functions during their term in office or, where special occasions arise, 6 hours per fortnight. Employees who are elected as a committee member of a committee of management of a community organisation may be granted leave of absence with pay for periods of up to 3 hours per fortnight, or where special occasions arise, 6 hours per month.
